# CGEventTapPlacement.tailAppendEventTap

**Case**

Specifies that a new event tap should be inserted after any pre-existing event taps at the same location.

## Declaration

```swift
case tailAppendEventTap
```

## Constants

- **CGEventTapPlacement.headInsertEventTap**: Specifies that a new event tap should be inserted before any pre-existing event taps at the same location.
